title: Arrays Deep Dive
story_hook: Spotify stores 10,000 songs in one array. Today you control memory rows like a pro.

content.story: Spotify stores 10,000 songs in one array. Today you control memory rows like a pro.

content.title: Arrays Intro Video
content.focus_note: Focus on traversal, indexing, and memory layout.

content.doc_md:
Arrays are contiguous memory blocks.

Techniques: two pointers, sliding window intro, prefix sums.

Signal: when you need fast indexed access, think arrays.

visualizer.task: Traverse and update array boxes; observe index-address mapping.
visualizer.notes: Watch how two pointers move from both ends.

practice_problems.prompt: Custom: Find second largest element in an array.
Custom: Rotate array by k positions.

quiz_questions.question: Array indexing is
quiz_questions.explanation: Arrays map indices directly to addresses.

quiz_questions.question: Two pointers are useful when
quiz_questions.explanation: Two pointers shrink the search space efficiently.

quiz_questions.question: Prefix sums help with
quiz_questions.explanation: Prefix sums compute ranges in O(1).

content.task_prompt: Build an array utility that returns sum, max, and prefix sum array.

recall_questions: When do you use two pointers?
What does a prefix sum array store?
content.identity_affirmation: You just became dangerous with the most used data structure in FAANG.
content.streak_reminder: Hashing is next - keep the streak alive.
